signal_title: Revised Code of Conduct on Countering Illegal Hate Speech Online
risk_rationale: The regulatory signal introduces enhanced requirements for detecting illegal hate speech and mandates improved transparency and accountability, aligning with the DSA framework. This represents a moderate risk as it requires updates to existing content moderation processes but does not pose an existential threat.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: CSAM detection using PhotoDNA + proprietary classifiers
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Strengthened measures for detecting illegal hate speech
compliance_gaps.gap_description: Current baseline focuses on CSAM detection but may not fully address the enhanced requirements for detecting illegal hate speech.

compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Enhanced transparency and accountability for platforms
compliance_gaps.gap_description: Existing transparency obligations may need to be expanded to meet the new requirements for enhanced transparency and accountability.

remediations.title: Enhance Hate Speech Detection Mechanisms
remediations.description: Develop and integrate advanced classifiers and detection algorithms specifically targeting illegal hate speech to comply with the revised Code of Conduct.
acceptance_criteria: Implementation of new hate speech detection algorithms

remediations.title: Expand Transparency Reporting
remediations.description: Update the existing transparency reporting framework to include detailed metrics and accountability measures specific to hate speech moderation.
acceptance_criteria: Updated transparency reports reflecting new metrics

business_impact: Moderate impact expected due to the need for system updates and potential increased scrutiny from EU regulators. However, aligning with these regulations will strengthen platform trust and compliance posture.
recommended_actions: Conduct a gap analysis of current hate speech detection capabilities
Initiate development of enhanced detection algorithms
Revise transparency reporting processes to include new requirements
